title: Peanutty Papillote Delight
description: A Norwegian-inspired dessert featuring a peanut filling wrapped in a delicate floral pastry, perfect for a sweet treat.
instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch (3 mm).
In a small bowl, mix together the peanut butter, sugar, and egg until smooth.
Spread the peanut butter mixture onto one half of the pastry dough, leaving a 1/2-inch border around the edges.
Fold the other half of the pastry dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Use a knife or pastry brush to create a decorative edge around the pastry.
Place the papillote on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
Let the papillote cool for 5 minutes before dusting with confectioners' sugar and garnishing with fresh edible flowers.
